idea-plugin.name: Terminal AI Watcher
idea-plugin.description: Monitors Android Studio's built-in terminal for AI CLI tool events (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) and sends IDE notifications with system sounds.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

  • New: IntelliJ IDEA support — works alongside Android Studio simultaneously
  • New: Dynamic port allocation — no more port conflicts when running multiple IDEs
  • New: Hook events broadcast to all running IDE instances
  • Fix: Stale port file cleanup on startup (handles IDE crash/force quit)
  • Fix: Race condition resolved — server fully ready before hook registration
  • Fix: Codex notify hook format corrected for reliable delivery
  • Fix: Filtered out idle_prompt / auth_success noise notifications
  • Fix: Global + project-level dual hook registration for all projects
  • Improve: Dock badge counter auto-resets when IDE gains focus
  • Improve: macOS notification uses Android Studio icon
  • Improve: Migrated to SimplePersistentStateComponent (future-proof settings)
  • Improve: Removed internal API reflection — uses official ContentManager API only

1.0.0

  • AI CLI Hook-based event detection (zero false positives)
  • Claude Code: Notification + Stop hooks for permission prompts and task completion
  • Codex: notify hook for task completion (agent-turn-complete)
  • Gemini CLI: Notification + AfterAgent hooks for permission prompts and task completion
  • Built-in HTTP server (localhost:19876) receives hook events
  • Auto-configures hook settings for each CLI tool on first run
  • IntelliJ balloon notifications with sound alerts (afplay)
  • Per-tool enable/disable in Settings > Tools > Terminal AI Watcher
